reviews.comment:
Todo muy bien como siempre, el café  con leche y la panadería excelente. Un detalle: por qué nadie se da cuenta, y más en pandemia, que el 80 % de.los que paramos vamos con las mascotas?!? Unos ganchos muchachos para que uno ate al perro y entre tranquilo!!!

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great as always, the coffee and the bakery were excellent. One thing: why doesn't anyone realize, especially during the pandemic, that 80% of us who stop by bring our pets?! Some hooks, guys, so we can tie up our dogs and go inside without worry!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHajVDVl9RRRAB
